title: asplenium obtusum
intro: Asplenium obtusum, also known as the serrated spleenwort or obtuse spleenwort, is a species of fern native to China and Southeast Asia, characterized by its unique serrated leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Asplenium obtusum include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and boosting the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and may also be used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine preparations.
